title: What is Debbie going to try to do?

meanings.usage: 指两个海域之间的狭窄水域，如English Channel（英吉利海峡）
表示从一边到另一边的动作
指陆地靠近海洋或湖泊的边缘地区
指最佳成绩或最高成就，如world record（世界纪录）
指将信息写下来或保存
指两点之间的空间长度
指有做某事的意图或目的
指对某事感到不安或忧虑
指通过练习来提高技能
指有一定形状的物质，与液体相对
指完成所期望或试图做的事
指在三者或更多事物之中

examples.en: She is going to set out from the French coast at five o'clock.
examples.zh: 她将在早上五点从法国海岸出发。

examples.en: She hopes to set up a new world record.
examples.zh: 她希望创造一项新的世界纪录。

examples.en: Many people feel that she is sure to succeed.
examples.zh: 许多人认为她一定会成功。

examples.en: Debbie intends to take short rests every two hours.
examples.zh: Debbie打算每两小时短暂休息一次。

examples.en: Most of Debbie's school friends will be waiting for her on the English coast.
examples.zh: Debbie的大部分同学将在英国海岸等她。

examples.en: Debbie Hart is going to swim across the English Channel tomorrow.
examples.zh: Debbie Hart打算明天游过英吉利海峡。

examples.en: Tomorrow he will be watching her anxiously as she swims.
examples.zh: 明天当她游泳时他将焦虑地注视着她。

grammar.title: be going to 表示将来（计划、打算）
grammar.definition: 表示根据现有证据或意图决定的将来动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + be (am/is/are) + going to + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用于表示计划、打算或即将发生的事情

examples.en: Debbie Hart is going to swim across the English Channel tomorrow.
examples.zh: Debbie Hart打算明天游过英吉利海峡。

examples.en: She is going to set out from the French coast at five o'clock.
examples.zh: 她将在早上五点从法国海岸出发。

grammar.title: will 表示将来（预测、临时决定）
grammar.definition: 表示单纯的将来或临时决定
grammar.structure: 主语 + will + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用于表示单纯的将来、预测或临时做出的决定

examples.en: Mr. Hart will be watching her anxiously as she swims.
examples.zh: 当她游泳时，Hart先生将焦虑地注视着她。

examples.en: Debbie will have something to drink but she will not eat any solid food.
examples.zh: Debbie会喝点东西但她不会吃固体食物。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be going to + 动词原形

original.en: Debbie Hart is going to swim across the English Channel tomorrow.
original.zh: Debbie Hart打算明天游过英吉利海峡。

imitations.en: I am going to visit my grandmother this weekend.
imitations.zh: 我这个周末要去看望我的奶奶。

imitations.en: They are going to set up a new company.
imitations.zh: 他们打算成立一家新公司。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + will + 动词原形

original.en: Mr. Hart will be watching her anxiously.
original.zh: Hart先生将焦虑地注视着她。

imitations.en: I will help you with your English.
She will be waiting for you at the station.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + is/are + 形容词 + to-动词不定式

original.en: Many people feel that she is sure to succeed.
original.zh: 许多人认为她一定会成功。

imitations.en: He is certain to pass the exam.
They are likely to arrive tomorrow.
